title: Pro Sound TWS Earbuds
description: High-quality wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation, crystal clear bass, and up to 30-hour total battery life with the charging case.

title: SonicBoom Bluetooth Speaker
description: IPX7 waterproof portable speaker delivering 360-degree punchy sound, rich bass, and continuous 20 hours of outdoor playtime.

title: Titan Pro Gaming Mouse
description: Lightweight wireless gaming mouse featuring a 16K DPI optical sensor, 6 programmable buttons, and ultra-low latency response.

title: Pulse Over-Ear Headphones
description: Premium wireless over-ear headphones with hybrid ANC, memory foam earcups, and high-resolution studio-grade sound quality.

title: NeoBand Fitness Tracker
description: Slim and lightweight fitness band featuring step tracking, sleep analysis, continuous calorie counters, and water resistance up to 50m.

title: OmniCharge 3-in-1 Wireless Dock
description: Fast charging wireless station that simultaneously charges your iPhone or Android phone, Apple Watch, and AirPods altogether.

title: Stealth Ergonomic Gaming Chair
description: Premium faux leather gaming chair with 4D adjustable armrests, full lumbar support pillow, and a 180-degree reclining mechanism.

title: AuraFit Smartwatch v2
description: Elegant smartwatch with AMOLED display, real-time heart rate monitoring, blood oxygen tracking, and 14 days of standby battery.

title: Apex Mechanical Keyboard
description: RGB backlit mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable blue switches, premium aluminum top frame, and dedicated media controls.

title: VoltCharge 20K Power Bank
description: Ultra-fast 22.5W power bank with 20000mAh capacity, dual USB-A output ports, and a sleek digital battery percentage display.
